📖 How to Use VYTARA

Your complete guide to getting the most out of the app.

⚡ Quick Start — 3 Steps

  1. 1

    Complete onboarding — enter name, weight, height, age, and select your goals

  2. 2

    Log your first workout or meal using the sidebar or bottom navigation

  3. 3

    Sign in with email to sync your data across devices using Firebase cloud

📊 Dashboard

  • • Today's Nutrition Rings — 5 progress bars for Calories, Protein, Carbs, Fat, and Fibre vs your daily targets
  • • 💪 Workout Consistency (Blue) — 365-day heatmap showing workout days. Streak = consecutive days you worked out
  • • 🥗 Nutrition Consistency (Green) — 365-day heatmap for days you logged meals. Tracked separately from workouts
  • • Personal Records — Your heaviest set ever for each exercise, auto-calculated from your logs
  • • Click any heatmap cell to view that day's stats in the nutrition and water cards

💪 Workouts

  • • Log Workout — Add exercises with Sets, Reps (or Seconds for timed exercises like Plank) and Weight
  • • ⏱ Timed Exercises — Plank, Side Plank, Wall Sit, Dead Hang etc. automatically switch to Seconds input
  • • Exercise Guide (ℹ️) — Click the info button on any exercise to see the muscle diagram and instructions
  • • Sets & Max Weight — Each exercise shows total sets completed and your heaviest set (not volume sum)
  • • Clone Workout — Repeat a previous workout with one click from the history list

🥗 Nutrition

  • • Log Meals — Click "+ Log Meal", choose a meal type (Breakfast, Lunch, Supplements…), add food items
  • • ✨ AI Search — Type a food name + quantity → click "AI Search" → Gemini AI auto-fills Calories, Protein, Carbs, Fat, Fibre
  • • Food Library — Save custom foods to your library. They appear in autocomplete next time
  • • Meal Presets — Create preset meals in Settings for one-tap logging of regular meals
  • • Units — Choose g, ml, pc (pieces), tablet, capsule, scoop etc. — great for supplements
  • • Same-day logs merge — All meals logged on the same logical day show as one entry in history

🎯 Goals

  • • Select Goal Tags — Choose from Bulking, Cutting, Fat Loss, Build Muscle, Endurance etc.
  • • AI Nutrition Suggestion — Once a goal is selected, a card appears with recommended Calories, Protein, Carbs, Fat, Fibre and Water targets calculated from your weight, height and goal type
  • • Apply Targets — Click "Apply These Targets" to set them as your daily nutrition goals
  • • Manual Targets — You can also set custom targets in the Daily Nutrition Targets section below
  • • Body Composition Goals — Set target weight, body fat %, and a deadline

📐 Body Metrics

  • • Log Weight & Body Fat — Track changes over time with date-stamped entries
  • • Sleep & Stress — Optional fields to track wellness metrics alongside body measurements
  • • Progress Chart — Weight trend chart updates automatically as you add entries

📸 Progress Photos

  • • Upload Photos — Add front, back, or side progress photos with a date label
  • • Before & After — Photos are sorted by date so you can see your transformation journey
  • • Cloud Sync — Photos sync to Firebase when signed in (compressed for storage efficiency)

⚡ Challenges

  • • Send Challenge — Enter a friend's email, choose a metric (workouts / calories / volume), and set an end date
  • • 📬 Incoming Requests — When someone challenges you, it appears here — you can Accept or Decline
  • • 🔥 Active Challenges — Only shows after both sides accept. Live scores update in real time via Firebase
  • • 📤 Sent Challenges — Track status of challenges you sent: Awaiting Response, Active, or Declined
  • • Requires Sign In — Firebase account needed for real-time sync between users

☁️ Cloud Sync & Google Fit

  • • Sign In — Use email + password to create an account. Your data syncs to Firebase and is available on any device
  • • Continue Offline — You can use the app without an account. Data stays on this device only
  • • 🏃 Google Fit — In Settings → Google Fit, click "Sign in with Google" to sync steps, calories burned and active minutes from your Google account's Fit data
  • • Why Google Sign-In? — Google Fit data is private to each user. Signing in lets the app read only YOUR Fit data with your permission — just like any fitness app
  • • Privacy — Google Fit sign-in reads only YOUR personal step and activity data. The app never stores or shares it.

⚙️ Settings

  • • Night Shift — Set a "day start hour" so meals logged after midnight count for the previous logical day
  • • Meal Presets — Create quick-add templates with food items for meals you eat regularly
  • • Food Library — Edit saved foods, adjust default amounts and macros per 100g
  • • Custom Exercises — Add exercises not in the built-in list
  • • Export — Download your complete data as PDF, JSON or CSV
  • • Dark / Light Mode — Toggle in the header

💡 Pro Tips

  • • Log meals immediately after eating for accuracy — AI Search makes it fast
  • • Use the Exercise Guide (ℹ️) on each exercise in the workout modal to see muscle diagrams and form cues
  • • Set up Meal Presets for your regular meals — saves time logging breakfast every day
  • • Your streak resets if you miss a day — log even a light session or a single meal to keep it going
  • • Use Clone on past workouts to repeat the same routine without re-entering all exercises
  • • Supplements like Creatine, Fish Oil etc. can be logged under "💊 Supplements" meal type with units: tablet, capsule, scoop
